narrative:
Jefferson Township has 2,151 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
